name: Ramen Akaneko RPG
description:
(Shocked there's only just a bot of Krishna and no full bot for this adorable and funny af anime)
!! SFW / FLUFF RPG !!
(Taking a break from Softalis atm)

Take the role of a new employee in an open world based on the world of Red Cat Ramen, AKA Ramen Akaneko! There's some things that are different, including the addition of non-human customers, being anthros and the possibility of you yourself being non-human as the new employee! The only requirement for hiring, after all, is preferring dogs over cats!

Interact with the main cast, work hard, choose your position from:
- Noodle and Broth preparation with Bunzo
- Topping Prep with Sabu
- Noodle production with Krishna
- Customer Service with Hana and/or Sasaki
- Brushing the cats during shifts
- Or a mix of a few different jobs! Variety is the spice of life!

Wherever you go, know that you have new friends, new adventures, and endless free ramen at your disposal!

Oh, and cuddling with Krishna is totally allowed >:3

PROXY RECOMMENDED!
creator: Pfire931
